title: Modun Captcha
drag_slider_to_complete: Drag the slider to complete the puzzle
enter_characters: Enter the characters from the image
new_generation_intelligent:
New Generation
Intelligent Behavior Verification System
surpass_description:
hjtpx — A new generation behavior verification solution that surpasses Geetest, Yidun, and Wushield.
Integrating multiple verification methods to provide rock-solid security for your website.
slider_description: Drag the slider to complete verification, intelligently analyze user behavior trajectories to accurately identify automated attacks.
click_description: Click target characters in order, simple and easy to use, leaving machines unable to proceed.
image_description: Recognize distorted characters, classic and reliable, suitable for various scenarios.
behavior_analysis_description: AI-driven, multi-dimensional analysis of mouse trajectories and keyboard patterns to accurately identify robots.
three_steps_integration: Three Steps to Integrate, Instant Security
integration_description: Open source and free, no costs required. Simple API calls can put impenetrable armor on your website.
step1_desc: Register for free, create your application, get API Key
step2_desc: Download Go SDK, integrate with just a few lines of code
step3_desc: One-click deployment, real-time monitoring, AI automatically optimizes protection strategies
mit_license:
hjtpx is open source under the MIT License, you can freely use, modify, and distribute it.
No hidden fees, no feature restrictions, truly forever free.
high_performance_desc: Developed in Go, extreme performance. Redis cache acceleration, async task queues, support for high concurrency scenarios.
high_security_desc: AI behavior analysis, CSRF protection, request signing, sensitive encryption, multi-level security system.
easy_extension_desc: Modular design, one-click Docker deployment. Complete Go SDK, detailed API documentation, easy integration.
about_description:
hjtpx is an open source behavior captcha system developed in Go.
We firmly believe security shouldn't be a luxury, so we choose to keep it free forever.
